## Summary
- Describe the change clearly.
- Link the issue, task, or release item when available.

## Validation
- [ ] `composer check`
- [ ] `composer test`
- [ ] `composer test:e2e`
- [ ] Additional manual verification completed when needed

## Deployment Notes
- [ ] No deployment-specific action required
- [ ] `.env` or secret changes required
- [ ] Migration included
- [ ] Rollback impact reviewed

## Evidence
- Include screenshots, sample output, or operator notes when they help review.
